zh.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall於1469年出生在英國素瑞。他和Elizabeth Stoner至少有1個女兒。他去世於1525年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall于1469年出生在英国素瑞。他和Elizabeth Stoner至少有1个女儿。他去世于1525年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wintershall
meanings: Anglo-Saxon: Winter, winter, and heal, a palace, meaning a winter palace

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall was born in 1469, in Surrey, England. He had at least 1 daughter with Elizabeth Stoner. He died in 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall est né en 1469, à Surrey, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Elizabeth Stoner. Il est décédé en 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall wurde 1469 in Surrey, England geboren. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Stoner mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1525 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall è nato il nel 1469 nel Surrey, England. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Elizabeth Stoner. Morì nel 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Bentley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアベントリー
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershallは1469年にイギリススリーで生まれた。彼はElizabeth Stonerとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1525年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall(은)는 1469년 영국 수리에서 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth Stoner(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1525년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall nasceu em 1469, em Surrey, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Elizabeth Stoner. Ele faleceu em 1525, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall родился в 1469 г. в местности сурри, Англия. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Elizabeth Stoner. Он умер в 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Wintershall nació en 1469, en Surrey, Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Elizabeth Stoner. Murió en 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.

th.Bentley, Yorkshire, England: เบนตลี, โยอรกชิเร, เอิงแลนด์
